introduction.label: introduction
introduction.title: About the school
introduction.lead: Greeting, school overview, calendar, and directions. Main text is in Korean.

about.label: about
about.title: About
about.body: Dodamdodam Korean Language School in Berlin provide Korean language, Hangul, culture, and history education with the goal of helping the next generation- including Korean children, multicultural children, adoptees, and local foreigners- develop a strong Korean identity, speak Korean confidently, and grow up in a healthy and emotionally supported environment through emotional coaching and character education.

legacy.boardFullCurriculum: Full curriculum list on Korean Net

vision.label: vision
vision.title: Vision
vision.lead: We broaden horizons through Korean and grow together in community.
vision.card1Body: Age-appropriate classes to build a solid foundation in Hangul.
vision.card2Body: Traditions, holidays, and stories bring Korea closer.
vision.card3Body: A warm place of learning connected to families and the neighborhood.
